legacy.full_text:
It's Tez Tuesday and I am aiming for 500 in my collection (Currently at 278). 

- Share your work and the story behind. 
- Tag your friends. 
- Follow me and our community @coi_nft.

result.text:
Heyo! 🐰

Inner Whispers ~

The artwork delves into the universal theme of the human struggle to reconcile our inner selves with external influences and societal norms. The human experience of self-discovery which is fogged by the barriers we create to shield our vulnerabilities from the outside world.

Tagging: @graphicurve @graffitiongrave 

https://t.co/AWg9e8ofYB

legacy.name: Jancarlo

result.text:
Hey Karan! Happy Tez Tuesday!

Here is a meaningful piece I created a year and a half ago right after my grandmother / abuelita passed away 

It’s titled “Peaceful” and is only one edition away from selling out

Mi abuelita had a special affinity with plants and her favorite flowers were orchids. Just as orchids are admired for their rare elegance and resilience, so too was she an extraordinary person, exuding a unique blend of strength and gentleness. The orchid's serene and timeless beauty reflects the enduring love and cherished memories that will forever bloom in my heart.  Though she is no longer physically with us, her legacy lives on, forever etched in the delicate petals of this "Peaceful" orchid.

https://t.co/5PCr7dNgJ5

Tagging @lukoart_ and @artbyEdub
